source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
2 tsp (12 g) salt, plus more to taste
3 green plantains, peeled and cut
¼ cup (½ stick; 57 g) vegan butter, plus more if needed
Freshly ground black pepper
3 tbsp (45 ml) olive oil, divided
¼ cup (40 g) diced yellow onion
¼ cup (38 g) diced mixed red and green bell pepper
1(12-oz [340-g]) block firm tofu, pressed
½ tsp ground turmeric
2 tbsp (16 g) nutritional yeast
1 tsp Adobo
1 tsp (⅔ [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 red onion, sliced
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp (30 ml) white vinegar
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
2 tsp (12 g) salt, plus more to taste
3 green plantains, peeled and cut
¼ cup (½ stick; 57 g) vegan butter, plus more if needed
Freshly ground black pepper
3 tbsp (45 ml) olive oil, divided
¼ cup (40 g) diced yellow onion
¼ cup (38 g) diced mixed red and green bell pepper
1(12-oz [340-g]) block firm tofu, pressed
½ tsp ground turmeric
2 tbsp (16 g) nutritional yeast
1 tsp Adobo
1 tsp (⅔ [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 red onion, sliced
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp (30 ml) white vinegar

ingredients.item: To a large pot filled with water, add the salt and the plantains, and boil for about 10 minutes, or until the green plantains are tender. Reserve 1 cup (240 ml) of the cooking water for later and drain the rest.
ingredients.original: To a large pot filled with water, add the salt and the plantains, and boil for about 10 minutes, or until the green plantains are tender. Reserve 1 cup (240 ml) of the cooking water for later and drain the rest.

ingredients.item: In a medium-sized skillet over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil, then add the onion and bell pepper and sauté until fragrant. Now, add your pressed tofu and begin to break it down into crumbles. Add your turmeric, nutritional yeast, adobo, Sazón, and salt and black pepper to taste. Mix together and cook stirring occasionally for 8 minutes.
ingredients.original: In a medium-sized skillet over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil, then add the onion and bell pepper and sauté until fragrant. Now, add your pressed tofu and begin to break it down into crumbles. Add your turmeric, nutritional yeast, adobo, Sazón, and salt and black pepper to taste. Mix together and cook stirring occasionally for 8 minutes.

ingredients.item: In a small pot, combine the remaining tablespoon (15 ml) of olive oil, red onion, sugar and vinegar, and cook for about 5 minutes. Add salt and pepper to taste. This process will quickly cook and pickle the red onion.
ingredients.original: In a small pot, combine the remaining tablespoon (15 ml) of olive oil, red onion, sugar and vinegar, and cook for about 5 minutes. Add salt and pepper to taste. This process will quickly cook and pickle the red onion.
